claims.description: The static MdWrk lander emits and verifies SEO, AEO, AiEO, crawler policy, LLM discovery, markdown mirror, structured data, and metadata parity artifacts.
claims.title: Lander SEO AEO AiEO discovery profile is statically verifiable

claims.description: Localized public lander pages use crawlable locale URLs, same-locale canonicals, hreflang alternates, sitemap alternates, visible locale switcher links, and no automatic locale redirects.
claims.title: Public lander international SEO is statically discoverable

claims.description: The frozen P1 current-partials boundary features are implemented and supported by the recorded client, package, lander, governance, and browser evidence.
claims.title: P1 current partial features are implemented and evidenced

features.description: Normalize locale frontmatter, HTML lang, hreflang, sitemap alternates, content registry locale fields, and JSON-LD inLanguage from one BCP 47 language tag value.
features.title: BCP 47 language metadata normalization

features.description: Validate ISO 8601 date, date-time, and duration values across MdWrk public lander metadata, sitemap lastmod fields, content registry timestamps, and JSON-LD temporal properties.
features.title: ISO 8601 temporal metadata normalization

features.description: Use clear answerable headings for article support sections while preserving the primary reading experience.
features.title: Lander AEO answerable heading contract

features.description: Render answer blocks as appended article support content so AEO sections do not dominate the document opening or interrupt the article body.
features.title: Appended AEO answer blocks

features.description: Generate FAQ, Q&A, or how-to representations only when matching visible content and page-family eligibility exist.
features.title: Lander AEO FAQ QnA how-to eligibility

features.description: Ensure structured answer sections, metadata, and generated artifacts remain aligned with visible article support content.
features.title: Lander AEO structured answer section parity

features.description: Keep citations, source references, related APIs, and related docs visible when represented in generated metadata or discovery artifacts.
features.title: Lander AEO visible citation parity

features.description: Govern AI crawler access policy for search, answer retrieval, training ingestion, and unknown crawler behavior where upstream controls allow distinctions.
features.title: Lander AiEO AI crawler policy

features.description: Validate parity between content registry entries, sitemap, robots, Markdown mirrors, and LLM discovery files.
features.title: Lander AiEO content registry discovery parity

features.description: Keep important documentation and blog content available as crawlable plain text while generating semantic index projections for internal discovery and AI retrieval aids.
features.title: Crawlable text and semantic index projection

features.description: Emit accurate JSON-LD for public lander pages where structured data helps crawlers understand page identity, relationships, and article or documentation content.
features.title: AI and search structured data JSON-LD

features.description: Generate an expanded experimental llms-full.txt Markdown-readable projection of governed public content.
features.title: Lander AiEO llms-full.txt index

features.description: Generate a concise experimental llms.txt map of important MdWrk public pages and documentation for LLM retrieval.
features.title: Lander AiEO llms.txt index

features.description: Keep generated Markdown mirrors aligned with canonical visible content, registry entries, and LLM discovery projections.
features.title: Lander AiEO Markdown mirror consistency

features.description: Distinguish search inclusion and answer retrieval crawler policy from model-training crawler policy when documented user-agent controls exist.
features.title: Lander AiEO search versus training crawler policy

features.description: Emit canonical URL metadata for public lander pages and verify alignment with generated routes.
features.title: Lander SEO canonical URL metadata

features.description: Publish MdWrk comparison pages against Obsidian, Typora, VS Code, MarkText, Zettlr, Notion, Logseq, and standard Markdown editors while preserving the no-Typora-recommendation policy.
features.title: Lander SEO comparison pages

features.description: Track Core Web Vitals page-experience targets for public lander pages as platform-guidance discoverability targets.
features.title: Lander SEO Core Web Vitals targets

features.description: Emit DCMI metadata where page families need document or archival metadata parity.
features.title: Lander SEO DCMI document metadata

features.description: Publish canonical product pages for the major MdWrk demand clusters, including offline, local-first, privacy-first, file manager, preview/editor, extension host, theme packs, and developer documentation pages.
features.title: Lander SEO demand-cluster canonical pages

features.description: Emit governed HTML title, meta description, and link metadata for public lander pages.
features.title: Lander SEO HTML title meta link metadata

features.description: Emit Open Graph metadata that matches canonical page identity, visible content, and fallback image policy.
features.title: Lander SEO Open Graph metadata

features.description: Generate and validate robots.txt crawler policy for public lander discovery without local-only or deployment-internal routes.
features.title: Lander SEO robots policy

features.description: Generate and validate sitemap.xml coverage for canonical public lander URLs.
features.title: Lander SEO sitemap protocol

features.description: Emit X Card metadata that matches canonical page identity, visible content, and fallback image policy.
features.title: Lander SEO X Card metadata

features.description: Validate Schema.org EntryPoint urlTemplate variables and target route parity when public action targets become governed for MdWrk lander pages.
features.title: RFC 6570 EntryPoint URL template validation

features.description: Govern stable Schema.org vocabulary selection, supported terms, release-baseline handling, and standards authority for MdWrk public lander structured data.
features.title: Schema.org vocabulary baseline

profiles.description: Capability profile grouping the lander SEO, AEO, and AiEO discoverability features for answerability, crawler policy, metadata, robots, sitemap, and llms index coverage.
profiles.title: Lander SEO AEO AiEO discovery profile
